blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,260 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
